A 100

MCDONALD'S #34356

This grade is calculated by us from Florida DBPR public inspection records — Florida does not issue official grades. How we calculate it →

Data last updated: August 14, 2025

MCDONALD'S #34356 is a Other restaurant at 5370 STADIUM PKWY in Rockledge, Brevard County, in Central Florida. At its most recent health inspection on August 14, 2025, it received a grade of A with a score of 100 out of 100. Inspectors recorded no outstanding violations. By health score, it is safer than 100% of Brevard County restaurants. Diners give it an average rating of 3.4 stars across 1378 reviews. Typical prices fall in the $1–10 range.

Inspections trending: stable · last inspected 317 days ago

Get directions Call (321) 632-1563
